questions.question: According to the staff-evolution chart in the CERN in Figures section, how many staff members did CERN have in 2023?
According to the CERN staff breakdown for 2025, how many technicians did CERN employ?
What were CERN's personnel expenses for 2025, in MCHF?
Who signed the message from the Director-General in this report?
What are the four large LHC experiments named in the report?
In one or two sentences, what is this document and what period does it cover?
questions.gold: CERN's Annual Report for 2025 (the seventy-first annual report of the European Organization for Nuclear Research), presenting the year's highlights - record LHC luminosity in its final full year before Long Shutdown 3, first oxygen and neon runs, the completed FCC Feasibility Study, new Member State Slovenia - plus governance, outreach, environment and budget figures.
